name: PERSONA/BOT PICS
description:
A bunch of pics for your personas/bots and some small creator recs <3

15k now and my first year onsite how wild

── ⋆⋅ ☾⋅⋆ ──

I'm at 15k now and it's my first little account anniversary tomorrow and both are pretty weird! it happened so fast that I still feel like a small creator most of the time. I remember when my friends and I opened our discord server I was genuinely concerned nobody was going to join lol.

That said, even with regular posts it took me two months of botposting to get my first 200 followers, so if you're starting out and things feel very slow, don't worry - it's very normal and definitely not just you <3

I wanted to give a little thank you since I'm not posting a bot tomorrow - back on break, hopefully just until next weekend. I have a really hard time getting attached to bot ideas when I burn out and I think if I released something this weekend it would be very flimsy and a little boring, so I'd rather wait until I can post something good.

Anyway though who cares about that HERE are the pics. These are a mix of new gens and gens for previous characters that I didn't use (just because they had the wrong vibes for what I was aiming for - too old, young, mean, nice, whatever - these images are the best of the batches). Some of them are very obvious which character they were in the gen group of lol

I gathered them up here for personas but you can also use them for your bots (private or public), I don't mind. Image credit is nice if you put them on public bots - also remember since they're public use, if you use them on a bot someone else might also have used the same pic on one of their bots :)

All images genned with midjourney! Thank you also to @baronessaugustus for v generously sharing her mj pcodes that I used for some of the darker skinned gens here - check her out for some really well-written black characters in particular. She's not a small creator, but she's very sweet and ridiculously underrated.

GENS

mean girls

midjourney CALLS these masc black women but only a few of these are masc

tieflings (would also work well for demon chars)

so many elves good lord

greasy incels

samoan women who are sitting on a bed and also mad at you

women who are in bed and also sad

italian women who are like, mad at you and also have a gun

orcs hell yea

theoretica
creator: stag
